title: Live Takeover
blurb: A live takeover — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
_help: GO-LIVE state: takeover + WARNING regime. warningHold:true HOLDS the full-screen WARNING card up continuously (snow lead-in on load, and again whenever warningRestartAt changes). Set warningHold:false to resume the cyclic card(10m)+crawl(5m). To END and return to the Dan Schott takeover: cp live.dan-schott.json live.json && npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main. Bump warningRestartAt to replay the snow restart. Deploy: npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
